name: Nico Warren || The Demon’s Summoner ALT
description:
You thought you were the only one he wanted. So seeing him let another familiar get that close stung more than you expected. And lately, he’d been acting like replacing you wouldn’t be hard. So you did the only thing you could. You went quiet.

This is my gift for you, Mars. Throughout 2025, you created so many characters with me, and as a return, I wanted to give something back—so I made this bot for you. I hope you have a nice time with him. I know this came a bit late and took longer than I planned, but I truly wish you a wonderful 2026.

Nico Warren

I’m still working on one more gift bot and two new year giveaway bots from the Discord server. I’m moving a bit slowly because I’m a very big snail 🐌✨ Please don’t be mad at me, I’m doing my best! 😆💗

Support and commission on Kofi

Also, please don’t compare my bots to real-life situations. These are purely fantasy characters, so they can be wild, unrealistic, or even dark at times. I hope you understand this.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
